vision: TRON Security Operations Center — cyber network intelligence you feel, not just read

stories.title: Navigation Architecture
stories.description: Route-based App Router: / (Dashboard), /speedtest, /history, /traffic, /settings. Sidebar with cyber aesthetic — electric cyan active states, monospace labels, subtle circuit-line decoration.

stories.title: App Shell — Cyber Sidebar
stories.description: Fixed sidebar 240px. Logo: NetPulse with a pulsing dot indicator (green=online, red=offline). Nav items: Dashboard (LayoutDashboard), Speed Test (Zap), History (BarChart2), Traffic (Activity), Settings (Settings2). Active: electric cyan left border + glow. Background: #0A0A0B. Scan-line texture overlay. Status bar at bottom: connection type, ISP name (from ipapi.co), current IP.

stories.title: Dashboard — Live Metrics Strip
stories.description: Top KPI bar: Ping (ms), Download (Mbps estimate from navigator.connection), Upload (N/A until tested), Connection Type (4G/WiFi/Ethernet from navigator.connection.effectiveType), VPN Status (detected/not detected). Each metric: large monospace number, small label, status dot, micro sparkline showing last 10 readings. Auto-refreshes every 5 seconds by polling navigator.connection + doing a quick ping to speed.cloudflare.com/__ping.

stories.title: Speed Test Engine + Animated Gauge
stories.description: Core speed test using XHR to speed.cloudflare.com. Download: fetch /__down?bytes=25000000 with progress tracking (onprogress event counting bytes/time). Upload: POST /__up with random blob. Run 4 parallel streams for accuracy. Display: large radial arc gauge (SVG-based, not Recharts) showing Mbps in real-time as test runs, animated needle sweep. Results: Download Mbps, Upload Mbps, Ping ms, Jitter ms. Green gradient fill as speed increases. Cyberpunk aesthetic: hex grid background, scan-line animation during test, 'SCANNING...' text.

stories.title: Speed History & Benchmarks
stories.description: Store speed test results in localStorage: {date, download, upload, ping, connectionName}. User can name each connection ('Home WiFi', 'Coffee Shop', 'VPN ON'). Area chart (Recharts — dynamic import + ssr:false + h-[300px] explicit parent) showing download speed history. Table of all tests with date, location name, speeds. Best/worst/average stats cards. Compare mode: select two named connections to see delta.

stories.title: VPN Detector
stories.description: Detect VPN using 3 signals: 1) WebRTC IP leak (RTCPeerConnection to extract local IPs — 10.x/172.16-31.x/192.168.x = VPN tunnel), 2) IP geolocation mismatch (fetch ipapi.co/json, compare country vs browser timezone), 3) navigator.connection effective type drop. Show: VPN Status badge (DETECTED/CLEAN), confidence score 0-100%, IP shown (masked for privacy), geolocation city+country, method that triggered detection. If VPN detected: show speed penalty estimate vs last non-VPN test. Cyber security terminal aesthetic: green-on-black text, blinking cursor, 'ANALYZING ROUTE...' animation.

stories.title: Traffic Analysis — PerformanceResourceTiming
stories.description: Passive traffic analyzer using PerformanceObserver watching PerformanceResourceTiming entries. Show: live feed of network requests as they happen (URL domain, size, duration, protocol HTTP/2 vs HTTP/3, cache hit). Aggregate: top domains by request count + bytes, protocol breakdown pie chart (Recharts — dynamic import). Plain English summary: 'Your browser made 12 requests in the last 30s. 89% used HTTP/2. 3 third-party domains detected (ads/analytics). Average TTFB: 45ms.' Traffic flow visualization: animated dots moving left-to-right representing active requests. Security flags: highlight any HTTP (non-HTTPS), unusually large responses, known tracker domains.

stories.title: Connection Intelligence Cards
stories.description: Dashboard section showing: DNS Resolution Time (timing a known fast host), TLS Handshake Time (from PerformanceResourceTiming), TTFB (time to first byte), Geographic route estimate (ping to multiple regional Cloudflare servers to triangulate). Each metric with: current value, historical range, health indicator (green/amber/red), tooltip explaining what it means. Cyberpunk design: each card has animated border that pulses based on metric health.

stories.title: Mock Data + Data Layer
stories.description: Create src/lib/network.ts with: SpeedTestEngine class (XHR-based, parallel streams, progress callbacks), PerformanceMonitor class (PerformanceObserver wrapper), VPNDetector class (WebRTC + geolocation check), ConnectionMetrics class (pings speed.cloudflare.com, reads navigator.connection). Also: localStorage helpers for persisting test history. Types for all data structures.

stories.title: 21st.dev Components Integration
stories.description: Integrate the 3 design components: 1) NeonButton for all CTAs (Start Test, Clear History, etc.) — variants: default, cyan, green, red. 2) CpuArchitecture animation shown during active speed test (replace idle spinner with circuit animation). 3) Glass button style throughout. Also: add lib/utils.ts (cn helper), global CSS animations (neon glow, scan-line, circuit pulse). Add biome.json to exclude .next/.

stories.title: Responsive + Final Polish
stories.description: Mobile responsive at 320px, 768px, 1440px. Sidebar collapses to bottom nav on mobile. Speed gauge scales properly. Toast notifications for: test complete, VPN detected, new record speed. Lighthouse >85. Zero console errors. biome check clean.
